generators.description: Dial in, describe what you saw last Tuesday around 2am. Tap to gain 1 Encounter. At 10 owned, a Call-In Host takes over.

upgrades.name: Stock Question List
upgrades.description: Every caller, same five prompts: what did you see, where, when, who else, were there missing minutes.

upgrades.name: Convention Circuit
upgrades.description: Hotline becomes hotel ballroom. Believers gather, callers get awards.

upgrades.name: International Affiliate Stations
upgrades.description: Spanish, Japanese, German hotlines, same call-screening rules.

generators.description: Mimeographed broadsides nailed to telephone poles. THE TRUTH IS OUT THERE.

upgrades.name: Offset Printer
upgrades.description: Tens of thousands of fliers per night, ready by morning paper-route.

upgrades.name: Celebrity Endorsement
upgrades.description: A rock star wears the disclosure pin on stage. The pin sells more than the album.

upgrades.name: Greyhound Bus Posters
upgrades.description: Captive audience, six-hour rides, two cross-country routes a week.

generators.description: A tell-all paperback. Hypnotic regression. Missing time. The publisher orders a second printing within a week.

upgrades.name: International Co-Editions
upgrades.description: Same abduction, seventeen languages, translated first into the believer markets.

upgrades.name: Implant Recovery Lab
upgrades.description: Tiny grey objects, recovered surgically, displayed on TV. Provenance fuzzy.

upgrades.name: Sealed Witness Archive
upgrades.description: Affidavits no one can verify, archived just out of reach of every reporter.

generators.description: The Discovery Channel, the History Channel, the Travel Channel. Same eight reenactment actors recycled across thirty episodes.

upgrades.name: Cinematic Music Cues
upgrades.description: Strings on the witness's face, brass for the saucer. The cue does half the work.

upgrades.name: Documentary Visual Grammar
upgrades.description: Low-angle witness shots. Sweeping aerial of the supposed crash site. Choral dread.

upgrades.name: Streaming-Service Auto-Play
upgrades.description: Watched one episode? Three more queue up before you can reach the remote.

generators.description: Art Bell at the mic, 1am Pacific, every truck stop and overnight shift listening. One voice, all night, the whole continent.

upgrades.name: Affiliate Network
upgrades.description: 500 AM stations from Boston to Bakersfield, every overnight slot tied up.

upgrades.name: Sidelined the Skeptics
upgrades.description: The skeptic guest hour becomes the recurring "believer" hour. Critics don't get invited back.

upgrades.name: Doctrine of Repetition
upgrades.description: The same caller, the same story, the same insistence — week after week, year after year. Eventually it just IS the consensus.

generators.description: Three pale men in dark suits arrive at the witness's door. They are very polite. They strongly suggest he never speak of it again. He never does.

upgrades.name: Black-Sedan Fleet
upgrades.description: Identical, unmarked, perfectly polished. They arrive in convoys.

upgrades.name: Engineered Embarrassment
upgrades.description: The witness's neighbors suddenly all hear about his marital troubles. The story collapses.

upgrades.name: Friendly Insider Voices
upgrades.description: Real "former intelligence officers" appear on podcasts, walk back specific stories, and seed three new ones.

prestige_bridge_copy: Disclosure flickers, then fades back into rumor. The investigation closes. Somewhere in a quieter forest, a child hears a story she will never quite shake — and the whole thing begins again.
